nasb.text: They also honored us with many marks of respect; and when we were setting sail, they supplied us with all we needed.

esv.text: They also honored us greatly, and when we were about to sail, they put on board whatever we needed.

cnv.text: 他們多方面尊敬我們；到開船的時候，又把我們所需要的東西送來。

ccb.text: 他们处处尊敬我们，在我们启航的时候，又赠送我们途中所需用的物品。

csbs.text: 他们十分尊重我们；开船的时候，还送上所需要的东西。
